title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions!
